overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a military simulation game showing a walk along a winding coastal mountain road. The player moves past Mediterranean-style rural buildings with terracotta roofs, through scrub vegetation, with panoramic views of the sea and distant coastal town.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal mountain road with rural buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the road away from the yellow house, heading inland

entered.detail: single-story Mediterranean house with terracotta roof and beige stucco walls
calm blue sea visible in the distance beyond the coastal hills
cluster of buildings visible along the distant coastline
small structure with dark roof visible down the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment begins beside a yellow rural house with a terracotta roof overlooking the Mediterranean Sea. The camera moves forward along a gravel road, passing the house and revealing a distant coastal town on the right while a black-roofed building appears on the left hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road through scrub vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt road surrounded by dense scrub and trees

entered.detail: steep rocky slope with sparse vegetation rising beside the road
thick Mediterranean scrub and small trees lining the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The road winds through a more enclosed mountain passage with dense scrub vegetation on both sides and a rocky hillside rising on the right. The sea view shifts to the left as the path curves inland through the Mediterranean landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook with panoramic coastal views

events.description: camera pans left to reveal panoramic view of the coastal town and Mediterranean sea

agents.ego_description: turning to face the sea to observe the panoramic coastal view before continuing

entered.detail: wide-angle view of the coastline, sea, and distant town from the mountain overlook
thick green tree canopy lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left at a bend to reveal a stunning panoramic view of the Mediterranean coast and distant town. After taking in the vista, the perspective continues forward along the gravel road, now with dense forest on the right and the open sea view on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural road passing large residential building

events.description: large beige rural building comes into view on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking past the large beige building on the left, observing its stone foundation

entered.detail: two-story rural house with beige stucco walls and terracotta roof, featuring stone foundation walls
low stone wall supporting the building's foundation along the road

segments.scene_description: A large beige rural building with a stone foundation appears on the left side of the road. The camera walks past this structure, which dominates the left side of the frame, while the road continues toward distant village buildings visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain road with distant village

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open road toward the distant rural buildings on the horizon

entered.detail: cluster of rural buildings visible on the hillside ahead along the road
distant mountain peaks forming the horizon line

segments.scene_description: Having passed the large building, the road opens up again with scattered trees on both sides. The camera continues along the gravel path toward a cluster of distant rural houses visible on the hillside ahead, with mountain ridges forming the backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding gravel road that transitions from an open coastal overlook into a secluded mountain passage before reopening toward a distant hillside village. It begins beside a yellow rural house with a terracotta roof, moving forward to reveal a distant coastal town and a black-roofed building on the hillside. As the road curves inland, the scene shifts into a more enclosed passage flanked by dense scrub vegetation and a rocky hillside, causing the sea view to migrate to the left. The camera then turns at a bend to capture a wide panoramic vista of the Mediterranean coast before continuing past a large beige stone building that dominates the left side of the frame. Finally, the path opens up again through scattered trees, leading the perspective toward a cluster of rural houses set against a backdrop of mountain ridges.
